messages.content:
what answer to this email: I may only do it if you have worked with me at least three years in the past, it seems you are not. 


Best,
Jackie

Dear Jackie,

Thank you for your email. I understand your policy regarding working with colleagues for at least three years in the past. Unfortunately, as you mentioned, we have not had the opportunity to work together yet.

However, if you have any upcoming projects where you might consider working with me in the future, please do not hesitate to reach out. I am always open to discussing potential collaboration opportunities.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

what answer: Sorry  I am running the ICSE2023 conference and am very busy on organisational work.

John

Dear John,

Thank you for your reply and update. I completely understand that running the ICSE2023 conference must keep you very busy with all the organizational work.

If there is anything I can do to help or support you with the conference, please do not hesitate to reach out. I am always happy to assist in any way possible.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

what answer: 
 
Thank you very much for your interest in a research / supervision at our chair. Unfortunately, we have no PhD positions available and no capacity for further supervision. 
 
You find currently open positions under:
https://portal.mytum.de/jobs/wissenschaftler/newsboard_view  
 
We are sorry for not being able to provide an opportunity and wish you all the best with your applications.

Best regards,

Dear [Name],

Thank you very much for getting back to me. I appreciate your response and understand that your chair does not have any PhD positions available and no capacity for further supervision at this time.

Thank you for providing me with the link to the currently open positions. I will keep an eye out for any future opportunities that may arise. 

Again, thank you for your time and consideration. I wish you all the best with your ongoing research.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

what answer: 
Thanks very much for your enquiry. Right now we have no vacancies that fit your broad range of skill sets and level of experience. However, I have forwarded your query to colleagues in other NZ academic groups who may be interested in what you have to offer.


Ngā mihi nui | Kind regards

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your prompt response to my enquiry. I appreciate the information that you have shared and I understand that there are no vacancies at this time that fit my broad range of skill sets and level of experience.

I would like to thank you for forwarding my query to your colleagues in other NZ academic groups. I sincerely hope that they might have opportunities that suit my qualifications and experience.

Again, thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from your colleagues.

Ngā mihi nui | Kind regards,

[Your Name]

what answer: Apologies. I have no positions available currently.

My working hours may not be your working hours. Please do not feel obligated to reply outside of your work schedule.


Josephine McMurray, MRT, MBA, PhD, FBTM
Associate Professor

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for taking the time to respond to my enquiry. I understand that you currently do not have any positions available at this time. 

Thank you also for letting me know not to feel obligated to reply outside of my work schedule. I appreciate that you respect my time and understand the importance of maintaining a healthy work-life balance.

Once again, thank you for your time and consideration. I will keep an eye out for future opportunities and hope to stay in touch.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

i did not recivied reply to this email what email agin follow: Dear Prof. Dr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,
I am just following up to check if you have got some time to have a look at my previous email. Thank you for your consideration.
Best regards,
Saeid

Dear Prof. Dr. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to follow up on my previous email to you, which I sent [date of initial email].

I have not yet received a response from you and I just wanted to check if you've had the opportunity to review my previous email. I understand you may be busy and I don't want to be a bother, but I would greatly appreciate any feedback or response you may have.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,

Saeid

what answer : 

Thank you for your e-mail and your interest in our professorship. Since we
are a junior professorship, our funds are very limited and I cannot offer
any position in the near future. I recommend applying at more established
chairs.

Best regards,

<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for taking the time to respond to my email and for your honest response about your professorship having limited funds.

I understand that you may not have any positions available at this time and I appreciate your recommendation to apply at more established chairs.

I am grateful for your consideration and I will follow up on the opportunities you suggested.

Thank you again for your time and I wish you all the best in your work.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

what answer: 

thank you very much for your message and your interest in joining my research group.

Currently, I do not have any open positions.

I wish you all the best, and fingers crossed that you find the position you want!

Best regards
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for responding to my message and for considering my interest in joining your research group.

I appreciate your honesty on the current availability of open positions. I am disappointed to hear that there are no open positions at this time, but I understand that opportunities may arise in the future.

Thank you for your well-wishes and support in my job search. I will continue to pursue other opportunities.

Thank you again for your time and I wish you all the best in your work.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

what answer : 
I'm very sorry for my late response to your prior emails. I noticed that your first email was September last year, during that month I was away and then a few trips here and there during the semester Fall.
Saeid, you have indeed a strong profile and our research interests aligned. Unfortunately, I don't hold any significant grants to hire a post-doc. I'm working on research projects in the health sector, specifically on community pharmacies now, but have local master research assistants supporting the project. I plan to apply for larger grants next year and if successful; the plan is to hire a PhD or post-doc researcher.
Our school is rather small and does not have a PhD program hosted at our Faculty. So, it's challenging to build a research group. But we are working on it.
What type of research do you do in the digital health context?
Cheers,
Paola

Dear Paola,

Thank you for your response and for getting back to me despite the delay. I understand that you have been busy and I appreciate you taking the time to reply.

Thank you for your kind words about my profile and your interest in our research interests aligning. I understand that your funds and resources are limited at this time.

In response to your question, my research focuses on [briefly describe your research in the digital health context].

Thank you for sharing more about your research projects in the health sector, specifically on community pharmacies. It is inspiring to hear about your plans to apply for larger grants next year and if successful, hire a PhD or post-doc researcher. I wish you all the best in your endeavors.

Thank you again for your time and I hope that our paths may cross in the future.

Best regards,

Saeid

edit: Dear Paola,

Sorry for the late reply. Thank you for your response and your kind words about my profile. 

In response to your question, my research focuses on digital therapeutics app adoption in the digital health context.

Thank you for sharing more about your research projects. It is inspiring to hear about your plans to apply for larger grants next year. I wish you all the best in your endeavors.

Thank you again for your time and I hope that our paths may cross in the future.

Best regards,

Saeid

Dear Paola,

I hope this message finds you well. I want to apologize for the delay in my response. Thank you for getting back to me and for your kind words about my profile.

In response to your question, my research focuses on the adoption of digital therapeutics apps in the context of digital health.

I appreciate you sharing more about your research projects, specifically on community pharmacies. It is motivating to hear about your plans to apply for larger grants next year. I wish you the best of luck with your research.

Once again, thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of our paths crossing in the future.

Best regards,

Saeid

what answer:  thanks for your interest.  I'm delighted the research has been helpful to you.  At present, I'm not working on digital health issues or digital transformation issues but am instead focused on market design to deal with misinformation.  My current work is therefore on free speech and fake news.  It didn't seem as if this overlapped your research so it wasn't clear how to proceed.  Best wishes, MVA

Dear MVA,

Thank you for taking the time to respond to my message and for your kind words about the impact of your research.

I appreciate your openness regarding your current focus and interests. I respect your work on market design to deal with misinformation and your focus on free speech and fake news.

While our research interests may not overlap at the moment, I appreciate your response and look forward to learning more about your work in the future.

Thank you again for your time and best wishes in your research.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

edit: I hope this email finds you well. 
I am just following up to check if you got some time to have a look at my previous email.
As i mentioned earlier, your research highly area matches my research interest. So, I can working with you on my own funding. Please let me know if you need anything else. 
Best regards, 
Ahmad

Dear [Recipient],

I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out to follow up on my previous message, which I sent [date of initial email]. 

I mentioned in my previous email that your research highly matches my research interests and I would be interested in working with you on my own funding. I wanted to check if you had any updates or if there is anything else you may need from me to consider a potential collaboration.

Please let me know your thoughts on this matter at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

edit: I hope this email finds you well. 
I am just following up to check if you got some time to have a look at my previous email.
As i replied earlier to your email, I can secure my own funding. 
Please let me know if you need anything else. 
Best regards, 
Ahmad

Dear [Recipient],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to follow up on my previous message, which I sent [date of initial email].

As I mentioned in my previous email, I wanted to reiterate that I have the ability to secure my own funding. I am very interested in potential collaboration with you, and therefore would be glad if there is any update on the possibility of such collaboration.

Please do let me know if there is any further information you need from me or any other steps I can take to progress in this matter.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
edit: Please let me know when you have prepared the package so that I can pay the government filing fee.

Dear [Recipient],

I hope this email finds you well. I am following up on our previous conversation about the package you agreed to prepare for me.

Could you please kindly let me know when the package is ready so that I can proceed with the payment of the government filing fee?

Thank you and I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

edit: 
Thank you for letting me know when the package will be ready to ship so I can pay the government filing fee.

Dear [Recipient],

I appreciate your response. Thank you for letting me know when the package will be ready to ship. Once I receive the package, I will proceed with the payment of the government filing fee.

Thank you again for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
